emails.subject_base: Air Products - plant down for 4 days.
emails.body: Air Products plant down for 4 days. Did you want me to confirm down on this meter starting today. (POPs). Deal is at 3,000 and pathed at 0. meter 1418 thanks Julie

emails.body: Re: Air Products plant down for 4 days. Julie, You need to keep the nom and confirm at 3000 so that the buyback calculation will work correctly. D From: Juliann Kemp/ENRON@enronXgate on 04/04/2001 11:49 AM
